entries.gt_00145e891bb510: The Room Settler left the apartment. Now the corridor is his too.
entries.gt_00b6333e940ba7: Lampoglaz lost its light lock. The dark corner holds the pause.
entries.gt_015ed7bcf773cb: The Protocolist found your papers. The longer the fight, the heavier the protocol.
entries.gt_01ddce4f485281: Red mold in the crates is feeding the barrel. Remove the sample or burn faster.
entries.gt_036bc34bf54581: The Thin Shadow backs toward a dark line. Do not follow it into the corridor.
entries.gt_051c027a1a8c9d: The papers around the Office Idol lined up. A cabinet, wall, or rush into melee will break the shot.
entries.gt_06f20fc62fa382: The Paragraph is finishing a straight line. Break sight or rush in after the salvo.
entries.gt_0bfee84ca6e97d: The Paragraph noticed you: its clause flies only in a visible straight line.
entries.gt_0da58840c33c9d: ${entityDisplayName(e)} pulled ${target.type === EntityType.PLAYER ? 'тебя' : entityDisplayName(target)} to the pipe
entries.gt_0e65e592a433e6: Chernosliz opens a green slit in the water. A corner, dry edge, or light breaks the first salvo.
entries.gt_1324367fcb0a12: The echo vanished at the threshold: Bezekhiy is visible now, but its lunge is broken.
entries.gt_14a15ba380beda: Gas gills clapped in the fog. Fog Sharks formed a pack.
entries.gt_16c347af7a6f18: The Protocolist sped the pages around you. Hide the documents or get behind a door.
entries.gt_18afd547e7923b: The Protocolist holds an empty protocol. A long fight still feeds PSI pressure.
entries.gt_1e70139c2b331e: Bezekhiy sprang from the jamb, but missed.
entries.gt_1f016bc0e4c8fa: The Thin Shadow could not keep waiting and returned without its flanking line.
entries.gt_20171b78dc6dc1: The Assembled Man turned several heads at once. Back off toward slime or a hermodoor threshold.
entries.gt_209c861816d278: ${entityDisplayName(e)} jumped to the bait and is chewing
entries.gt_2115228ce7b8bf: The Garbage Swarm turned its edge toward the smell of food. Seal the supply or throw bait aside.
entries.gt_252c5f74a518d7: ${entityDisplayName(e)} sheared off an armor plate and clipped ${targetLabel}: -${dmg}
entries.gt_2598da3ace5c5b: The Assembled Man lost the target by the slime. This is a window to retreat or report.
entries.gt_29cb952e8ead9f: The Protocolist lost a protocol line: door, cabinet, or distance gave you a window.
entries.gt_2f3347d11b6eae: The blood plant root struck from the floor: -${dmg}
entries.gt_30ffa3c34cf8f1: ${entityDisplayName(e)} struck from the side out of the fog: -${dmg}
entries.gt_32c6125c56af97: The robot is spinning up plasma. Get off the line and strike after the flash.
entries.gt_3505b0377a1b4e: A cold draft pulled from the closed door. The False Spirit is about to cross the jamb: move into the open or strike clean.
entries.gt_355ce373cea66b: Light or noise broke the Thin Shadow's dark line.
entries.gt_36d8689bb24ab1: Distance broke the shot: the source lost the line.
entries.gt_3748fc3e428655: The Idol does not move: cut the corner and close in between PSI salvos.
entries.gt_37d043f4aeb80c: Chervie tugged the local network. Nearby people hear someone else's order.
entries.gt_387beaea6eb73b: The carpet drifts toward the exit like a household rag with another breath inside.
entries.gt_3a1aa622e3541f: ${entityDisplayName(e)} flew into you along a red crack: -${dmg}
entries.gt_3e4190ca1e75cf: The Protocolist almost closed the protocol. Papers in your pocket press like someone else's signature.
entries.gt_4315ce17f10ac0: Paupsina holds a sticky straight line. The web does not kill, but it catches your legs for a few seconds.
entries.gt_43b38ed2e444ea: Fire folded the Tumannik's false flank.
entries.gt_445ab9ea23c1e6: The Deep Shadow lost its second tempo while you did not chase the trail.
entries.gt_4768310ac5a79f: ${name} holds a firing line. The shot will have a warmup.
entries.gt_492da774b734e8: Treskotnik crashed into an obstacle and crumbled: -${selfDamage}
entries.gt_4c2a6dce48b731: Bezekhiy sprang from the jamb behind you: -${damage}
entries.gt_4c951823f257dc: The Deprived touched the light inside you: your throat dried out, your legs went weak.
entries.gt_4ce24752981156: The Idol's PSI beam died behind geometry. The source is open to approach.
entries.gt_4daca4658ecbdf: ${entityDisplayName(e)} missed the lunge and is slowly pulling its belly together
entries.gt_4ed9d956ccc52d: ${entityDisplayName(e)} snapped at the smell and hit ${label}: -${dmg}
entries.gt_52b9d75663df30: The Tumannik sounds off to the side of its silhouette. Light, fire, or a dry step will fold the deception.
entries.gt_53b79a732af4da: Safeguard put you under denial. Break the line: the white windup is short.
entries.gt_5416538399b349: Treskotnik lost the straight line and scattered its lunge against the corner.
entries.gt_54a6b69d69d15a: Mukhozhuk shouted someone else's order. Obeyed: ${commanded}.
entries.gt_5517a9a0664fbd: The Kontorshchik tugged ${mark.itemName}, but the paper is already marked otherwise.
entries.gt_610a74afd1625f: The Eye is warming up a green firing line. A corner, door, or cabinet will break the shot.
entries.gt_637308c06c5068: In the black water, ripples moved against the flow: Chernosliz holds a dirty line.
entries.gt_66eb2bf86e72a9: The Pipe Automaton burned through the wet line and went into cooldown. Now there is a window to close in or flank.
entries.gt_691dc007363df6: ${entityDisplayName(e)} hits ${label} from outside the silhouette's center: -${dmg}
entries.gt_698435b63268ab: Rzhavnik struck with its first lunge: -${damage}
entries.gt_6c496e85cbb9fd: The Wild Deadman pushed through the crowd. Open floor and an early hit break its lunge.
entries.gt_6fbefe94c2fdae: Buckshot broke the Assembled Man's meat tempo.
entries.gt_75289624330d6a: The Shadow is preparing a lunge from darkness. Step back into light or out of range.
entries.gt_7a459e3426dbc9: Rzhavnik missed its first lunge and fell into a brittle gait.
entries.gt_7e9f62b2490104: Paupsina crouched on its front legs: it is about to spit web. A cabinet, door, or close pressure breaks the spit.
entries.gt_7faa488cd99877: Slepoglaz charged a green beam into ${sourceText}. Step aside before the flash.
entries.gt_813902de900c3f: Panelnik scrapes a slab hand along the wall: the panel is armored and has a long strike.
entries.gt_815d22c808c3e4: The carpet spat spores in your face.
entries.gt_81bd09ba2c33e4: The Black Liquidator bent its mask toward the sample. The number on it rubbed away: this is not a cleanup.
entries.gt_8359c49158d912: Light folded the Deep Shadow's second silhouette.
entries.gt_85a48d7c1ca47d: Room slime spread over the wall: ${ai.growthCount}/${OBZHIVALSHCHIK_GROWTH_CAP}.
entries.gt_865ac6d9ae380e: Lampoglaz holds the light line. The yellow hum will end in a green shot.
entries.gt_87ec79d0c9f829: The False Spirit passed through a closed door and thinned for a moment. Finish it or move into an open passage.
entries.gt_89b77869e0ae51: ${entityDisplayName(e)} finished off ${entityDisplayName(target)} with a nerve strike
entries.gt_8c5e984b18c9fa: The Kontorshchik stamped ${mark.itemName}: the paper rustles and pulls a grab toward it.
entries.gt_8c734ee9cc467d: Slepoglaz hit the old noisy point. Wait out the next beam only by stepping aside.
entries.gt_8d4e8ac1a78190: The Shadow lost its lunge in light or at distance.
entries.gt_9027c4f9202490: Long fingers scratch behind the apartment wall. Do not hit the door without a plan.
entries.gt_90e16ed373f03a: The scratching stopped behind the door: a report or help broke the room's anger.
entries.gt_90f3e99c669159: Chervie caught ${chervieSourceLabel(source.feature)}: the green line holds the body again.
entries.gt_944bbc434c6abe: Paupsina's spit broke on concrete or furniture. Press the distance while it resets its legs.
entries.gt_9dbdf78525e73e: Slepoglaz burned through an empty place and sagged after the beam. Close in now.
entries.gt_9df64cc164709b: Protocol pressure: -${dmg}. Papers strengthen the verification.
entries.gt_9f64e1abd04e3d: The hit shattered Treskotnik's red lunge. It takes a long time to pull the slabs back together.
entries.gt_9f9214af721c5e: The Black Liquidator froze at an open hermodoor. Red lenses flashed outside regulation.
entries.gt_a2e52bb8f02894: The carpet lifted a corner and hung in the passage. Veins twitch in the fabric.
entries.gt_a31a33c5e78154: The Paragraph's clause hit cover. You can close in now.
entries.gt_a609bcff3ad3b0: The Eye's shot broke on a wall or cover. Hold the corner until the flash.
entries.gt_a6eb9bfa690c42: A NET screen prints a fresh order in your name. Do not obey it: this is Chervie.
entries.gt_a8d62730e20504: Pressure is building in the water. Step onto dry concrete now.
entries.gt_a92eb8e39cd0da: The Shadow came out of the dark corner. Light, a step back, or a wide passage breaks the lunge.
entries.gt_aa9e691f83fb62: The firing line was broken by cover or a corner.
entries.gt_01ecd660d3fa1b: check the dispersed smog for loot and witnesses
entries.gt_05bf9389070654: check traders and assignments: some pressure has eased
entries.gt_0ff3e1e5534f27: check the container and witnesses while the trail is fresh
entries.gt_13d4c23eaae895: check the wrong-line station for the next route
entries.gt_186b3ff73bb7c0: ${room}${zone}: after the hermodoor, they count who survived. Lead: nearby stashes and debts.
entries.gt_1a3a7f6c3877da: ask who got the sample and whether the seal survived
entries.gt_258d4c4ae7fea8: find the lift and verify the floor before exiting
entries.gt_47a150afbc41d6: ${room}${zone}: someone passed the paper onward. Lead: factions will verify names.
entries.gt_525cef4ec9b75d: sand was taken from the white windowsill
entries.gt_5748fd94cd3ac2: the white slit was sealed over
entries.gt_60e550f1108d40: check prices and system-assignment pay: the shortage raised pressure
entries.gt_610a9ef49da91f: get out of the fog, close doors, and do not give the pack a straight approach
entries.gt_64cd9ef3f0786a: ask who got the sheltered roster and who turned extra in the lines
entries.gt_65b0939ceed6f5: check the workshop container before the batch is taken apart
entries.gt_66980ea7ea97d8: fire works, but keep distance from the gas belly
entries.gt_6f019672396757: prepare a filter or wet cloth, or bypass dense rooms
entries.gt_729342c82ce6a5: find the apparatus and shut off the source if you have a tool
entries.gt_7966db86c49791: look for platform 19 and do not board without a ticket
entries.gt_7ae9af9ae1e4ea: ${room}${zone}: the repair was entered in a good line. Lead: ask about a stash or discount.
entries.gt_7c5b042086c865: ${room}${zone}: the help was not forgotten. Lead: the common supply responds more softly.
entries.gt_815b57ee211734: check that the open remainder did not stay in inventory
entries.gt_014c3eb2714429: Veretar retreated. White sand stayed in the seams; check whether everyone left shelter.
entries.gt_070d1df22478e8: WET SAMOSBOR in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. From water to a dry hermodoor or higher floor.
entries.gt_088510fcfc684b: The bell places a step for you. Hold ${controlHint('interact')} to resist.
entries.gt_0e3ebffddce973: Hold the curtain with both hands. That is not our yard!
entries.gt_1453547c27264b: Zone ${zone.id + 1}: Istotit holds the yellow hermodoors. Do not touch the doors.
entries.gt_190b19ca311a25: Do not touch the green source with your eyes. Verify the door on the map!
entries.gt_1be1997365d513: You hold your step against the bell. Let go and your legs will go back to the yellow contour.
entries.gt_1e656a0720d9c1: sound: high beep; do not go to the source
entries.gt_20f1ec303e006a: Zone ${zone.id + 1}: ${variant.def.displayName}. Fog is moving through the cracks.
entries.gt_23727f19c2d3fb: map: yellow shelters ${shelterCount}; few places, short list
entries.gt_268e8c6e675a40: screens: ${screenCount} boards blinking; check the nearest
entries.gt_28cde97fd05463: Zone ${zone.id + 1}: Maronary. Green source and repeated door on the map.
entries.gt_295e902cdeb24e: ISTOTIT: yellow hermodoors are marked on the map; few places. Inside, press E: let a neighbor in or close yourself in alone.
entries.gt_299204e36f89c8: You stayed outside a working hermodoor. Fog came through the crack; it became painful to breathe.
entries.gt_2b3d311558f3b4: Zone ${zone.id + 1}: ${variant.def.displayName}. A white spot is crawling through the window.
entries.gt_2e76ed858ca1bd: The quiet went wrong. Board, map, hermodoor - now!
entries.gt_2e77e02c2e6506: map: white spot instead of a room
entries.gt_2f8bf1e0f1680b: map: there may be no siren; check the board
entries.gt_30abe6fe3d1a09: The siren broke into bells. To shelter, do not answer strange voices!
entries.gt_30d270a9432983: MEAT SAMOSBOR in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. From seams to the center of the passage or out of the zone.
entries.gt_327d4e759fab73: sound: low bell instead of siren
entries.gt_355b0d2086ee77: All-clear passed. Check the door, the map, and those who were supposed to come out after you.
entries.gt_3795944e9c3a41: The white window is not the yard. Drag the witness away and to the dark hermodoor!
entries.gt_3b9474b7abf5b3: Istotit rang off. Yellow dust stayed on the baseboards, the roster is in your hands.
entries.gt_42b3bf1739b5e7: Maronary fell silent. Green marks stayed by the doors. Check the door number before sleep.
entries.gt_43ca1fa97cfcfc: A large beast came out of the fog in zone ${zone.id + 1}. Kill it or get behind a hermodoor.
entries.gt_4b7617fd9b8e0e: Wet samosbor is running. Get off the floor, close the door early!
entries.gt_4f3408e181fa43: A beast at the white window appeared in zone ${zone.id + 1}. Kill it before the passage goes into the spot.
entries.gt_525cfb4e29bfe6: Light is blinking. From lamps to the hermodoor while the drive is alive!
entries.gt_5553363dd5f8ec: You broke the church order. The yellow hermodoor opened, and fog went into the room with people.
entries.gt_55848d813c560d: Smell ozone? Do not look at the lamps, to the door!
entries.gt_65325f666af12e: The walls smell of meat. Do not trust the quiet room!
entries.gt_668fac0b1b4155: You went toward the bell. Yellow dust stayed on the floor, and the path to the hermodoor became longer.
entries.gt_6f138a686290ac: VERETAR in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. Away from the white window, to a dark hermodoor, or out of the zone.
entries.gt_845ed1ed33c7d6: Hear the bells? To the yellow hermodoor. Inside, decide: let the neighbor in or close yourself in alone!
entries.gt_8c34bc73e6ba8b: sound: external alarm beyond the white window
entries.gt_8e54511152d0d3: ISTOTIT in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. To the yellow hermodoor. Inside, decide: let a neighbor in or close yourself in alone.
entries.gt_90f13366bd3bf6: SAMOSBOR in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. To a hermodoor, out of the zone, or close yourself in early.
entries.gt_9111a7e7245cd9: Hear the beep? Do not look into the green, check the door number!
entries.gt_97deffd1fb9ec7: QUIET SAMOSBOR in ${seconds}s: ${zoneText}. There may be no siren; check the map, boards, and neighbors.
